VJs TV is the global broadcast network for VJ culture, audiovisual performances, and digital visual art. Watch live performances, discover artists, and explore the world of visual performance.

Follow Us

Mad Mapper

Partner Tier Technology Partner

Mad Mapper is the industry standard for projection mapping and LED pixel mapping. Its intuitive interface and deep feature set make it the tool of choice for touring VJs, installation artists, and broadcast designers worldwide.

As a VJs TV Technology Partner, Mad Mapper is embedded throughout our artist profiles, technology pages, and live broadcast branding.

Sponsored Artists
  • Luna Visuals
  • Pixel Storm
  • Aurora Fractals
